name: Standard Chartered Ultimate Credit Card
exclusions: government payments earn lower points per official value chart
milestoneBenefits: 6,000 reward points worth INR 6,000 on payment of joining fee
additionalBenefits: 5 reward points per INR 150 spent and 1 reward point equals INR 1
4 complimentary domestic lounge accesses per calendar quarter
1 complimentary international lounge access per month via Priority Pass subject to prior month spend criteria

salaried: Applicant age should be between 21 and 65 years
selfEmployed: Applicant age should be between 21 and 65 years
